headline: Gilead Sciences: Caution After A Re-Rating Amidst New Concentration Risks
summary: Gilead Sciences has experienced a significant valuation re-rating, now trading at 16-17x earnings after doubling from 2024 lows. Read why GILD stock is a hold.
